cause_analysis.narrative: Allure Natural Beauty churned on 2026-02-16 after 114 days with Zoca. Sentiment turned negative on 2026-01-21 (phone_call) — first complaint keyword: "problem". Classification: service complaint. Negative signals appeared but no explicit cancellation request. 1 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side.
recommendations: [Escalation] First negative sentiment on 2026-01-21 via phone_call. Triggering a same-day AM touchpoint on any negative keyword would have caught this.
[Sentiment] Add an automated sentiment alerting layer over app_chat/email that pages the AM when negative keywords appear.
[SLA] 1 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.

[SLA example] On 2026-02-12 via email, client wrote: "Subject: Re: Refund Confirmation\n\nBody: Hello, thank you for making me aware of this charge. I will view my account to…" — no outbound response in 30 days.
